text:
Cling (lit. , rom. Adohījon) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to view the contents of the target player's restricted card slots at any time.
__NOTOC__

|

Summary

This spell allows the caster to view a complete list of the contents of another player's designated slot cards at all times. Essentially, this card is a continuous "Fluoroscopy". The effect is rescinded if the target player leaves the game.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1033 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名の指定ポケットの全データを常に知ることができる。（対象プレイヤーがゲーム外に出るまで効果は継続する。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1033 :: Cling 
Complete data of one player's restricted slots will be available at all times. (Effect lasts until player leaves the game.)
|}

Trivia

Latarza considered using this card on Killua in Chapter 128, but switched to the less rare "Trace" since he assumed it would be a waste.
